help.meta.title: Help Center | ReserveHub
help.meta.description: Find answers to your questions about ReserveHub. We're here to help you with your restaurant reservations.
help.hero.title: How can we
help.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
help.faq.description: Quickly find the information you need by selecting a category below.
help.reservations.q1.question: How to book a table
help.reservations.q1.answer: Simply use the search bar on the homepage to find a restaurant. Select your preferred date, time, and party size, then click "Book Now". You'll receive an instant confirmation via email.
help.reservations.q2.question: Modifying a booking
help.reservations.q2.answer: You can modify your reservation by visiting your "My Profile" page. Locate the booking under "My Reservations" and click the edit icon to change the date or party size.
help.reservations.q3.question: Cancellation policy
help.reservations.q3.answer: Most restaurants allow free cancellations up to 24 hours before the booking. Specific policies for each restaurant are displayed during the booking process.
help.reservations.q4.question: Large group bookings
help.reservations.q4.answer: For parties larger than 10, some restaurants require direct contact. This will be indicated on the restaurant's page. Alternatively, you can email our group booking desk.
help.account.q1.question: Setting up your profile
help.account.q1.answer: Click the user icon in the top right corner to access your profile. Here you can update your name, email, and notification preferences.
help.account.q2.question: Resetting your password
help.account.q2.answer: If you've forgotten your password, click "Forgot Password" on the login page. We'll send a reset link to your registered email address.
help.account.q3.question: Deleting your account
help.account.q3.answer: To delete your account, please contact our support team at support@reservehub.com. We will process your request within 48 hours.
help.payments.q1.question: Is there a booking fee?
help.payments.q1.answer: ReserveHub is completely free for diners. We do not charge any booking fees. Some restaurants may require a deposit for special events or large groups.
help.payments.q2.question: How to request a refund
help.payments.q2.answer: If you paid a deposit through ReserveHub and cancelled within the allowed window, the refund is processed automatically. It usually takes 5-10 business days.
help.payments.q3.question: Accepted payment methods
help.payments.q3.answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AMEX) and digital wallets like Apple Pay and Google Pay for any required deposits.
help.restaurants.q1.question: List your restaurant
help.restaurants.q1.answer: Interested in joining our network? Visit our 'Partners' page and fill out the application form. Our team will contact you within 48 hours.
help.restaurants.q2.question: Managing your availability
help.restaurants.q2.answer: Partners get access to the ReserveHub Merchant Dashboard to manage floor plans, block times, and view real-time booking data.
help.technical.q1.question: Browser compatibility
help.technical.q1.answer: ReserveHub works best on the latest versions of Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Edge. Please ensure your browser is updated for the best experience.
help.technical.q2.question: Reporting a bug
help.technical.q2.answer: Found something wrong? Please email tech-support@reservehub.com with a screenshot and a brief description of the issue.
help.privacy.q1.question: How we use your data
help.privacy.q1.answer: We use your data only to facilitate reservations and improve your experience. We never sell your personal information to third parties.
help.privacy.q2.question: Social login safety
help.privacy.q2.answer: Using Google or Facebook to log in is completely secure. We only access your basic profile information (name and email) to create your account.
help.privacy.q3.question: Managing cookies
help.privacy.q3.answer: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are required for the platform to function correctly.
help.contact.title: Still need help?
help.contact.description: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any questions.
help.contact.email.title: Email Support
help.contact.email.description: Our typical response time is within 2 hours.
help.contact.chat.title: Live Chat
help.contact.chat.description: Chat with a member of our support team instantly.
help.contact.phone.title: Phone Support
help.search.noResults.title: No results found
help.search.noResults.body: We couldn't find any matches for "{term}". Please try a different search term or contact us below.
